name: fix-codex-retry-loop
description: Diagnose repeated Codex retry and reconnecting loops, then safely update local proxy settings on Windows, macOS, or Linux.

interface.longDescription: Detect local proxy listeners, distinguish network failures from authentication responses, and update Codex proxy settings only after explicit confirmation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fix Codex Retry Loop to diagnose repeated Codex retry or reconnecting errors and update the proxy configuration only after confirmation.
